title: Amount currency mismatch
text: amount_currency_mismatch amount currency mismatch this error occurs when trying to use multiple amounts together in an operation while they are expressed in different currencies. all monetary operations must involve amounts expressed in the same currency. amount currency mismatch the two amounts use different currencies and cannot be combined. failed to perform the monetary operation because the involved amounts are expressed in different currencies: 127.33 eur and 57689 usd. amounts were used in a monetary operation without having been converted to the same currency. verify whether all amounts involved in the operation were converted to a common currency before being used together. amounts expected to be expressed in the same currency were provided with different currencies. check the currencies associated with each amount and confirm whether a common currency was expected for this operation.

title: Transaction date outside statement period
summary: Transaction date is outside the statement period.
text: bank_transaction_file_date_out_of_statement_period transaction date outside statement period this error occurs when trying to validate a bank statement file that contains one or more transactions dated outside the statement period. all transactions must occur within the statement period. banktransactionfilevalidator transaction date is outside the statement period. a transaction date falls outside the statement period. transaction dated 2024-02-02 is outside the statement period [2024-01-05;2024-01-31]. the transaction date provided in the statement file is incorrect or inconsistent with the actual transaction date. verify the transaction date present in the input file and confirm its consistency with the actual transaction timeline. the statement period defined in the file does not match the actual coverage period of the transactions. check whether the statement start and end dates in the file align with the period covered by the transactions. the transaction was posted after the statement was generated but was mistakenly included in the file. determine whether late-posted transactions were included in the statement generation process. an internal processing error caused the transaction date to be shifted during data transformation or import. examine the data import and transformation stages to confirm that transaction dates are preserved without alteration. transaction_date the date of the transaction being processed.

title: Statement total amount mismatch
text: bank_transaction_file_statement_total_amount_mismatch statement total amount mismatch this error occurs when trying to validate a bank statement file whose declared total amount does not match the sum of the individual transaction amounts. the statement total amount must equal the sum of all transaction amounts included in the statement. banktransactionfilevalidator statement total amount mismatch. the declared statement total does not match the computed total. the declared statement total amount (1250 eur) does not match the computed total amount from transactions (1249.5 eur). the total amount declared in the statement file does not match the sum of the individual transaction amounts. verify the declared total amount in the file and compare it with the sum of all transaction amounts. one or more transactions are missing or duplicated in the statement file. check whether all expected transactions are present exactly once in the statement file. a rounding or precision error occurred when calculating the statement total amount. examine how rounding and precision rules were applied when computing the statement total. an internal processing error altered transaction amounts during file parsing or transformation. inspect the file parsing and transformation stages to confirm that transaction amounts remain unchanged.

title: Exchange-rate service unavailable
text: exchange_rate_service_unavailable exchange-rate service unavailable this error occurs when the external exchange-rate provider cannot be reached (a timeout, a connection reset, or a 5xx response). it is transient: the call can be retried. currency conversion depends on a reachable exchange-rate provider. exchangerateprovider exchange-rate service unavailable. the exchange-rate service is temporarily unavailable; please retry later. the exchange-rate provider 'acme-fx' is unavailable (correlation 22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222). the provider timed out or returned a server error. check the provider's health and retry the call, ideally with a backoff. the outgoing network path to the provider is disrupted. verify outbound connectivity and any proxy or firewall between the service and the provider. provider the external provider that was called. correlation_id the correlation identifier of the outgoing call.

title: Malformed statement payload
text: malformed_statement_payload malformed statement payload this error occurs when the statement upload endpoint receives a request whose body is missing a required field or carries an invalid value. an uploaded statement request must carry every required field with a valid value. statementuploadendpoint malformed statement payload. the uploaded statement request is missing a required field or contains an invalid value. the statement upload request 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 is malformed: the 'statementperiod' field is missing or invalid. the client sent an incomplete or malformed request body. inspect the field named in the context and confirm the client sends it with a valid value. request_id the identifier of the incoming request. field the request field that failed validation.

title: Non-positive transfer amount
text: money_transfer_amount_not_positive non-positive transfer amount this error occurs when a money transfer is requested with an amount that is zero or negative. a money transfer amount must be strictly positive. moneytransfer transfer amount must be positive. the transfer amount must be greater than zero. cannot transfer -25 eur: the amount must be strictly positive. the amount was entered or computed as zero or a negative value. check the requested transfer amount and confirm it is greater than zero. transfer_amount the monetary amount of the attempted transfer.

title: Invalid money transfer
text: money_transfer_invalid invalid money transfer this error aggregates every domain rule violated while validating a money transfer, so the caller sees all the problems at once rather than one at a time. a money transfer must satisfy every domain rule (a strictly positive amount, matching currencies, ...). moneytransfer invalid money transfer. the money transfer does not satisfy all the required rules. the money transfer is invalid: it violates one or more domain rules. one or more domain rules were violated by the requested transfer. inspect the aggregated inner errors to see each individual rule violation.

title: Statement upload rate-limited
text: statement_upload_rate_limited statement upload rate-limited this error occurs when too many statement uploads arrive in a short window and the endpoint throttles the request. it is transient: the same request can be retried later. callers must stay within the endpoint's upload rate limit. statementuploadendpoint statement upload rate-limited. too many statement uploads were sent in a short period; please retry later. the statement upload request 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 was rate-limited; retry after 30 seconds. the caller exceeded the allowed request rate. back off and retry after the delay indicated in the message. request_id the identifier of the incoming request.

title: Temperature below absolute zero
text: temperature_below_absolute_zero temperature below absolute zero this error occurs when trying to instantiate a temperature with a value that is below absolute zero. temperature cannot go below absolute zero because absolute zero is the point where particles have minimum possible energy. temperature temperature is invalid. the temperature -1 k is below absolute zero. failed to instantiate temperature: the value -1 k is below absolute zero. temperature is invalid. the temperature -280 °c is below absolute zero. failed to instantiate temperature: the value -280 °c is below absolute zero. the value entered manually by a user is invalid. verify the value entered by the user and assess its compliance with domain rules. the value received from an external system (api, message, etc.) is invalid. check the data provided by the upstream system and evaluate its validity against domain rules. the value was loaded from corrupted or outdated persisted data. examine the persisted data source to determine whether stored values comply with current domain rules. the value was computed internally without using domain-safe methods. inspect the internal computation logic to confirm that domain invariants are preserved. the value originates from system configuration or defaults that are incorrect or outdated. review the relevant configuration or default parameters to assess their compliance with domain rules.

title: Unsupported currency pair
text: unsupported_currency_pair unsupported currency pair this error occurs when the exchange-rate provider does not quote a rate for the requested source/target currency pair. a currency conversion can only be performed for a pair the provider quotes. exchangerateprovider unsupported currency pair. the requested currency pair is not supported. the exchange-rate provider does not quote the eur to usd currency pair. the requested currency pair is not offered by the provider. confirm the provider supports both the source and target currencies before requesting a conversion. from_currency the source currency of the conversion. to_currency the target currency of the conversion.
